guard_summary.shape_reminder: Durable merge overrides use aliases.entity alias_id -> target_id entries; this prep artifact names both target_id/canonical_id and alias_id explicitly.
guard_summary.exclusion_policy: Excluded entity alias IDs already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json and entity alias IDs already prepared in visible codex-identity-batch047 through codex-identity-batch117 review notes.
conservative_guards: No role/person, committee/member, agency/subunit, office/person, or source-time false-friend candidates included.
Candidates are exact display-name matches with legal/vendor/company/contractor context and source-backed evidence.
One candidate with an ASW/AWS source spelling mismatch was intentionally dropped during prep.

command_evidence.purpose: Inventory visible review notes, overrides, and canonical files.
Build durable entity alias exclusion set; observed alias_id -> target_id shape.
Build visible prior prepared entity alias exclusion set through identity117.

command_evidence.command: jq duplicate-display-name scans over data/canonical/entities.jsonl with the combined exclusion set
command_evidence.purpose: Find exact display-name duplicate entity records, then narrow to legal/vendor/company/contractor candidates.

command_evidence.command: jq selected-record extraction from data/canonical/entities.jsonl and cited raw/sources/*/blocks.jsonl
command_evidence.purpose: Collect deterministic source-backed evidence for selected proposed aliases.
